channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-17244] sanity: test_813 'read sample (0) is wrong'
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for James Simmons <uja.ornl@gmail.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/21f002a6-a1d1-415a-8159-befcb94c90da

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/100024 - 4.18.0-477.21.1.el8_8.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/100024 - 4.18.0-477.21.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
